subject: Re: Love from Dubai
body:
gret send photos

----- Original Message ----
From: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com>
To: JE <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Friday, January 12, 2007 12:35:42 AM
Subject: Love from Dubai

Dearest Jeffrey,

I'm thinking of you and hope you're well and happy. 

  

I'm very happy in Dubai! It's a magical city. I log a lot of time in my barbie-car, mostly due to getting lost. 

 

This week I had six interviews w/ Private Equity firms and next week will also be busy. I'm very excited!!! 

 

The finance market is very hot and everybody's expanding and yet I think it would be easier for me to find a hubby than a job. I had a lot of "I can show you around" offers. However, since I always liked a challenge - I will go for a job. ;) 


 

Got my first parking ticket in Dubai so I guess I'm a real Dubaian now!

 

A lot of happiness and take good care of yourself,
-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062 







 
____________________________________________________________________________________
